prompt: A tidy set of four 3D printed PLA cable clips resting on a clean workbench. Each clip is sized to snap over a desk edge, with smooth inner channels and slightly flexible jaws ready to guide USB and charging cables. A caliper and a small pile of white PLA purge line sit nearby, showing the print was recently completed and measured. The scene is a near-future solarpunk workspace with soft, even lighting, organized tools, and a plant on a shelf; no brand logos or readable text are visible.
